name: RunCastle_units
_source: #Add the visiting player unit to castleUnits

#The console claims {unit} is a Set, but unlike a normal Set I can't access anything within it unless I do this bullshit. An entire for loop for one item. Since I don't want to do this again, I save it for later.
#Since units cannot be saved to game variables, we convert the names we saved back into units in order to construct the unit choice screen.
#Update this castle's associated variable with the unit names we've declared are inside it
#Saves which unit from castleUnits that you selected to game_var "chosenUnit"
$choice "_chosenUnit" "Which unit? " castleUnits 73 "vertical" "top" EventNid="test RunCastle_Market" EntryType="type_unit" Dimensions=(8,3),scroll_bar backable persist

#TO-DO: currently the way this functions (summoning the last chosen unit when backing out) is janky and can result in pulling out the wrong units when you don't intend to. I still need to make a proper event for removing units from the castle
#If the player cancelled out of choosing a unit, respawn their unit.
